MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order Setting Aside Dismissal To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities
Off Calendar Nov-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff First National Bank of Omaha's motion for order setting aside dismissal to enter judgment pursuant to stipulation is granted. No opposition filed.

FORMAL ORDER SIGNED. SEPARATE JUDGMENT SIGNED.
